title: Standardized Immunohistochemical Staining for Human Protein Atlas
author: Anna Martinez Casals
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.yj8furw

steps.title: Dry paraffin sections at room temperature overnight
steps.instruction: Dry paraffin sections at room temperature overnight.

steps.title: Bake the paraffin sections from 12:00:00...
steps.instruction: Bake the paraffin sections from 12:00:00 to 24:00:00 at 50 °C .

steps.title: Xylene incubation
steps.instruction: Xylene incubation: incubate slides in xylene for 00:05:00 . incubate slides in xylene for 00:05:00 . incubate slides in xylene for 00:01:00 .

steps.title: 96% ethanol incubation & 30%H2O2 (1:100): incubate slides for 00:05:00
steps.instruction: 96% ethanol incubation & 30%H2O2 (1:100): incubate slides for 00:05:00 .

steps.title: Heat the slides immersed in retrieval...
steps.instruction: Heat the slides immersed in retrieval buffer for 00:04:00 at 125 °C in a pressure boiler (Decloaking chamber model DC2008INTL).

steps.title: After completed boiling, leave the slides...
steps.instruction: After completed boiling, leave the slides in the pressure boiler and let them cool down till 90 °C . Total time 00:45:00

steps.title: Place slides in the Autostainer 480,...
steps.instruction: Place slides in the Autostainer 480, all the incubations are done at room temperature. Autostainer 480 (ThermoFisher Scientific, cat# A80500007, https://www.thermofisher.com/order/catalog/product/A80500008 )

steps.title: Rinse slides in wash buffer
steps.instruction: Rinse slides in wash buffer.

steps.title: Incubate slides with Ultra V Block for 00:05:00
steps.instruction: Incubate slides with Ultra V Block for 00:05:00 .

steps.title: Rinse slides in wash buffer go to step #14
steps.instruction: Rinse slides in wash buffer go to step #14 .

steps.title: Incubate slides with primary antibody, diluted...
steps.instruction: Incubate slides with primary antibody, diluted in antibody Diluent OP, for 00:30:00 .

steps.title: Rinse slides in wash buffer go to step #16
steps.instruction: Rinse slides in wash buffer go to step #16 .

steps.title: Incubate slides with labeled HRP polymer for 00:30:00
steps.instruction: Incubate slides with labeled HRP polymer for 00:30:00 .

steps.title: Rinse slides in wash buffer go to step #18
steps.instruction: Rinse slides in wash buffer go to step #18 .

steps.title: Incubate slides with DAB solution for 00:05:00
steps.instruction: Incubate slides with DAB solution for 00:05:00 .

steps.title: Rinse slides in distilled water
steps.instruction: Rinse slides in distilled water.

steps.title: Transfer slides in the Autostainer XL
steps.instruction: Transfer slides in the Autostainer XL. Autostainer XL (Leica biosystems, cat# Leica ST5010 Autostainer XL, https://www.leicabiosystems.com/histology-equipment/he-stainers-special-stainers-coverslippers/products/leica-st5010/ )

steps.title: Counterstain slides with hematoxylin for 00:07:50
steps.instruction: Counterstain slides with hematoxylin for 00:07:50 .

steps.title: Rinse slides in lithium carbonate water...
steps.instruction: Rinse slides in lithium carbonate water diluted 1:5 from saturated solution for 00:01:00 .

steps.title: Rinse slides in tap water for 00:05:00
steps.instruction: Rinse slides in tap water for 00:05:00 .

steps.title: 80% ethanol incubation
steps.instruction: 80% ethanol incubation: incubate slides in 80% ethanol for 00:03:00 .

steps.title: Mount coverslip in each of the...
steps.instruction: Mount coverslip in each of the slide using Pertex as a mounting media.

steps.title: Ethanol absolute incubation
steps.instruction: Ethanol absolute incubation: incubate slides in ethanol absolute for 00:03:00 . incubate slides in ethanol absolute for 00:03:00 .

steps.title: 96% ethanol incubation
steps.instruction: 96% ethanol incubation: incubate slides in 96% ethanol incubation for 03:00:00 .

steps.title: 80% ethanol incubation
steps.instruction: 80% ethanol incubation: incubate slides in 80% ethanol incubation for 00:03:00 .

steps.title: Distilled water
steps.instruction: Distilled water: : incubate slides in distilled water or until antigen retrieval step.

steps.title: 96% ethanol incubation
steps.instruction: 96% ethanol incubation: incubate slides in 96% ethanol for 00:03:00 . incubate slides in 96% ethanol for 00:03:00 .

steps.title: 99% ethanol incubation
steps.instruction: 99% ethanol incubation: incubate slides in 99% ethanol for 00:03:00 . incubate slides in 99% ethanol for 00:03:00 . incubate slides in 99% ethanol for 00:03:00 .

steps.title: NeoClear incubation
steps.instruction: NeoClear incubation: incubate slides in NeoClear for 00:03:00 . incubate slides in NeoClear for 00:03:00 .
